jd_summary: Health-tech (AI-powered virtual primary care) hire splitting time ~50% HR operations (onboarding/offboarding, semi-monthly payroll coordination, benefits/compliance, policy rollout, EOR for international staff, recruiting interview coordination) and ~50% HRIS management (administer BambooHR, Remote, Notion, Sequoia One; data integrity, reporting/dashboards, system enhancements/integrations, regular HR data audits). Streamline people processes via technology.
yoe_required: 3-5 years in HR / people operations / related (employment law, legal ops, compliance-adjacent acceptable)
sponsorship_note: No sponsorship statement in JD (neither offered nor excluded). No ITAR/citizenship requirement. Sponsorship answer = truthful YES (Jamie needs H-1B transfer).
